result.stdout:
Meditatr v1.0.1

USAGE
  dotnet Meditatr.dll [options]
  dotnet Meditatr.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  Command           creates command and its handler 
  Dto               creates dto from given model 
  Query             creates query and its handler 

You can run `dotnet Meditatr.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
Meditatr v1.0.1

USAGE
  dotnet Meditatr.dll [options]
  dotnet Meditatr.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  Command           creates command and its handler 
  Dto               creates dto from given model 
  Query             creates query and its handler 

You can run `dotnet Meditatr.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Meditatr v1.0.1

USAGE
  dotnet Meditatr.dll Command --action <value> --model <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  creates command and its handler

OPTIONS
* -a|--action       Action name 
* -m|--model        Model class 
  -r|--return       Return type Default: "Unit".
  -H|--handlerprj   Project name where Handlers for Commands and Queries located Default: "/tmp/inspectra-clifx-medita-4678cfa6-d304fd32".
  -p|--prj          Project name where Commands and Queries located Default: "/tmp/inspectra-clifx-medita-4678cfa6-d304fd32".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
